tuning: E A D G B E
content:
IN CASE YOU STILL DIDNT HEAR THE SONG CHECK IT OUT :
http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FZAIXt_lWs4
--------------------------------------------------
Song : 3
Artist : Britney Spears
Tabbed By : Kal Mamkegh
For Requests or anything add me or Email me at : Kaladiga@live.com
or search for Kal Mamkegh via Facebook :)

3 is the newest Single By Miss Britney spears Premiered Today i think just 5 hours ago 
i instantly fell in love with this song so i decided to guitarize it hehe XD its really 
and easy everybody is gonna enjoy playing it :)

Tunning : Standard
Capo : Not a Must
Chords Used : [ch]Em[/ch] , [ch]C[/ch] , [ch]Am[/ch] , [ch]D[/ch] , [ch]G[/ch]

-------------------------------
here we go


Intro + Verse + Chorus : [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]

pre chorus  : [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] + [ch]C[/ch] 
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]

Bridge : [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]

Intro (for this first part of the Chorus Intro NO CHORDS just Acapella with Claps)

1, 2, 3
Not only you and me
Got one eighty degrees
And I'm caught in between
Countin'
(Chords start from here)

[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Everybody loves ***[/tab]
Countin'

To come out and play
If it's alright
[tab]      [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Am[/ch]
What do you say?[/tab]

Merrier the more
Triple fun that way
Twister on the floor
What do you say?
